blocks.text: Real Madrid Must Win as Barcelona's Nine-Point Lead Keeps Growing

La Liga's title race reaches a pressure point tonight — Real Madrid cannot drop points against Alavés while Barcelona cruise. Valencia and Mallorca meet in a relegation six-pointer with season-defining stakes. Casper Ruud opens his Madrid clay account.
🏅 Tour of Norway 2026 begins — Leknessund, Abrahamsen and Halland Johannessen lead the Norwegian charge
🎾 Casper Ruud opens Mutua Madrid Open campaign — Masters 1000 clay, his strongest surface
